tasks.summary: Authored required artifacts (SECURITY.md, COMPLIANCE.md, qa/reports/2026-04-25 verification report), wired Snyk security scan as a CI gate (split into its own workflow file for live status badge), updated README with paired CI + Snyk badges. Construction mode was activated mid-session after qa role hit immutable policy walls on .github/, repo-root docs, and .gitignore — human confirmed the role swap. All quality gates green on main: typecheck, lint, 23 test suites, snyk test (82 deps clean), snyk code test (0 high-severity findings). Final SHA: 9542fb5.

procedure.action: Read current ledger and note sequence number
Attempt to create lock file. If exists and not stale, wait and retry
Re-read ledger. If sequence changed, release lock and restart

write_protocol.description: All ledger entries are append-only. No entry may be modified or deleted after creation. Each entry includes a timestamp, acting agent role, action taken, domain affected, and outcome.
